LAW & MOTION/DISCOVERY, DEPT. 301, AS TO MAY-15-2025 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WESTLAKE SERVICES, LLC DBA WESTLAKE FINANCIAL SERVICES' HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION; THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. THE COURT GRANTS THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. EVEN ASSUMING THE HIGHER WAGE REPORTED BY THE EMPLOYER, JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S BASIC NEEDS AS SHOWN IN THE FINANCIAL STATEMENT OF NECESSITY EXCEED HIS INCOME. ORDER SIGNED BY THE COURT. CONFORMED COPIES WILL BE MAILED TO THE PARTIES. A CERTIFIED COPY WILL BE MAILED TO THE LEVYING OFFICER. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (301/CVA)

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-15-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF WESTLAKE SERVICES, LLC DBA WESTLAKE FINANCIAL SERVICES' HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The court grants the claim of exemption. Even assuming the higher wage reported by the employer, judgment debtor's basic needs as shown in the financial statement of necessity exceed his income.

Order signed by the court. Conformed copies will be mailed to the parties. A certified copy will be mailed to the levying officer.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
